eventPolicy.disabled: Native disabled behavior owns focusability and activation.
eventPolicy.pending: The button remains focusable; click activation is cancelled before the consumer onClick runs.

compositionPolicy.linkRendering: Use the separate Link contract for navigation.
compositionPolicy.familySignature: Precise Ink borders, Living Green action state, Violet focus, and an optional loading rail identify the Living Workbench family.
compositionPolicy.enhancement: pending and pendingLabel add focus-retaining progress semantics; false removes the indicator, busy state, loading rail, and activation guard.
